name: Southern-Style Ranch Beans
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Canned red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a heavy skillet with non-stick cooking spray or oil.
2. Add onions and water; sauté over medium-high heat until water has evaporated and onions are limp.
3. Stir in sugar, mustard, tomatoes, tomato liquid, vinegar, baked beans, and drained kidney beans.
4. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
